summary.en: For dry and wet high-abrasion screening of sand, ore, and aggregates.
summary.zh: 服务于砂石、矿石和骨料的高磨损干湿筛分场景。

description.en: Aggregate classification in mining is characterized by high impact and severe abrasion. For hard materials such as basalt and granite, Huayun supplies 65Mn spring steel woven mesh with HRC 45-50 hardness, and its pre-crimped structure keeps aperture geometry stable under high-frequency vibration. For wet classification with higher moisture, we recommend modular polyurethane panels whose elasticity and fatigue resistance help reduce blinding. The overall solution improves continuous operating time on vibrating screens and lowers cost per ton processed.
description.zh: 矿山骨料分级工况以大冲击、强磨损为特征。针对玄武岩、花岗岩等莫氏硬度较高的物料，华云提供 HRC 45-50 硬度的 65Mn 弹簧钢编织网，其预轧波纹工艺确保了在高频振动下的网孔稳定性。对于含水率较高的湿式分级，我们推荐模块化聚氨酯筛板，利用其优异的弹性和抗疲劳性能降低堵孔率。该方案能显著提升振动筛的连续作业时间，降低吨处理成本。

en: Focus on hardness and impact resistance
Choose woven or polyurethane media based on moisture content
Confirm tensioned or modular installation method
zh: 关注材质硬度与抗冲击性能
根据物料水分选择编织或聚氨酯材质
确认设备张紧或模块安装方式

seoTitle.en: Aggregate Screening Solutions | 65Mn Woven Mesh and Polyurethane Panels
seoTitle.zh: 矿山骨料分级筛网方案 | 65Mn编织网与聚氨酯筛板

seoDescription.en: Wear-resistant screening solutions for mines and quarries featuring 65Mn woven screens and modular polyurethane panels.
seoDescription.zh: 提供针对矿山、砂石厂的高耐磨筛网解决方案，主打65锰钢编织筛网与聚氨酯模块化筛板。

summary.en: Focused on dewatering, desliming, and media recovery in coal preparation and mineral processing.
summary.zh: 专注于洗煤、选矿过程中的脱水、脱介与物料回收。

description.en: In coal preparation and mineral processing, the key screening challenge is balancing dewatering efficiency with media recovery. Huayun welded slot screens use a tapered wire profile and a wide-underneath opening that helps prevent pegging while keeping very high open area and liquid throughput. For clean coal dewatering and tailings dry stacking, our stainless welded construction maintains strong weld integrity and stable apertures during long-term high-load operation, making it a critical component for improving desliming efficiency in coal plants.
description.zh: 在选煤和选矿流程中，筛分的核心痛点在于“脱水效率”与“介质回收率”。华云焊接条缝筛（条缝筛板）采用梯形丝设计，通过上窄下宽的物理结构消除了楔形堵塞隐患，确保了极高的开口率与流体通过量。针对精煤脱水与尾矿干排，我们的不锈钢焊接工艺保证了焊点的高剪切强度，在长期高负载运行下依然能保持网孔一致性，是洗煤厂提升“脱介”效率的关键部件。

en: Require very high open area to improve efficiency
Check weld strength and surface flatness
Evaluate slurry corrosion before selecting stainless grade
zh: 要求极高的开口率以提升效率
关注焊点强度与表面平整度
评估介质腐蚀性选择不锈钢材质

seoTitle.en: Coal Washing Dewatering Screens | Welded Slot Screens and Fine PU Panels
seoTitle.zh: 选煤洗选脱水筛网厂家 | 焊接条缝筛与细孔聚氨酯筛网

seoDescription.en: Dewatering and desliming screen media for coal preparation plants, including stainless welded slot screens and fine-aperture polyurethane panels.
seoDescription.zh: 专业提供选煤厂、洗选厂用脱水脱介筛网，主打不锈钢焊接条缝筛和高弹性聚氨酯细孔筛板。

summary.en: Precision classification for chemicals, fertilizers, grain, and industrial raw materials.
summary.zh: 适用于化工、化肥、粮食及工业原料的精密分级。

description.en: For fine classification duties in industrial production, we combine the precision of woven mesh with the structural strength of welded screens to build custom screening solutions. The systems are suited to fertilizer granule grading, chemical raw-material filtration, and grain pre-cleaning or deep-processing lines.
description.zh: 针对工业生产中的精细物料分级需求，我们利用编织筛网的精度优势和焊接筛网的结构强度，提供定制化的分级方案。适用于化肥造粒分级、化工原料过滤以及粮食初清与深加工流程。

en: Control screening precision and aperture consistency tightly
Material grades must meet industry compliance requirements
Support irregular custom fabrication to suit equipment
zh: 严格控制筛分精度与网孔一致性
材质需符合行业合规性要求

seoTitle.en: Custom Industrial Screening and Filtration Mesh | Precision Screens for Chemicals and Fertilizer
seoTitle.zh: 工业分级过滤网定制 | 化工化肥用精密筛网

seoDescription.en: Industrial screening and filtration solutions covering woven and welded screens with customization across multiple specifications.
seoDescription.zh: 提供工业级精细分级与过滤解决方案，覆盖编织筛网与焊接筛网，支持多种规格定制。
